---
title: "Oliver Frings"
---

<!-- TODO: when a headshot exists, add it as assets/profile.jpg and place
     <img src="assets/profile.jpg" class="hero-photo"> floated right of the intro. -->

[PhD candidate in Economics · AgroParisTech & Climate Economics Chair, Paris]{.lead-line}

## About

I study whether nature markets deliver what they promise. On the demand side, I measure public support for forest conservation and carbon offsetting across Europe with discrete choice experiments. On the supply side, I price what a carbon credit actually delivers — net of leakage, storage duration, and reversal risk — with actuarial models and Monte Carlo simulation.

I am a PhD candidate at [AgroParisTech](https://www.agroparistech.fr/) (BETA, Nancy), a research fellow at the [Climate Economics Chair](https://www.chaireeconomieduclimat.org/en/) in Paris, and a visiting scholar at the Department of Land Economy ([C-EENRG](https://www.ceenrg.landecon.cam.ac.uk/)), University of Cambridge. My thesis, *Pricing Credibility: Supply-Side Integrity and Public Acceptability in Nature Markets*, is due for defence in October 2026.

[Email](mailto:oliver.frings@agroparistech.fr){.pill}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DgFqKHYAAAAJ){.pill}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2682-2304){.pill}
[GitHub](https://github.com/o-frings){.pill}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliver-frings-x161/){.pill}
[CV (PDF)](assets/CV_Oliver_Frings.pdf){.pill}

## Education

[2023–2026]{.when} [PhD in Economics]{.what} [AgroParisTech, BETA (INRAE/CNRS/University of Lorraine), Nancy & Palaiseau — expected October 2026, incl. an ongoing research stay at the University of Cambridge (since 2025)]{.meta}

[2020–2022]{.when} [MSc in European Forestry (Erasmus Mundus)]{.what} [University of Eastern Finland & University of Lleida — thesis published in *Ecological Economics* (2023)]{.meta}

[2016–2020]{.when} [BSc in Forest Sciences]{.what} [Dresden University of Technology]{.meta}

## Awards

[2024]{.when} [Highly Commended Paper Award]{.what} [8th Workshop on Non-Market Valuation, University of Leeds]{.meta}

[2023]{.when} [Extraordinary Prize for Master's Degrees]{.what} [University of Lleida — best academic record 2021/22]{.meta}
